2604.10721.title: Turning Generators into Retrievers: Unlocking MLLMs for Natural Language-Guided Geo-Localization
2604.10721.paper_summary: Natural-language Guided Cross-view Geo-localization (NGCG) aims to retrieve geo-tagged satellite imagery using textual descriptions of ground scenes. While recent NGCG methods commonly rely on CLIP-style dual-encoder architectures, they often suffer from weak cross-modal generalization and require complex architectural designs. In contrast, Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) offer powerful semantic reasoning capabilities but are not directly optimized for retrieval tasks. In this work, we present a simple yet effective framework to adapt MLLMs for NGCG via parameter-efficient finetuning. Our approach optimizes latent representations within the MLLM while preserving its pretrained multimodal knowledge, enabling strong cross-modal alignment without redesigning model architectures. Through systematic analysis of diverse variables, from model backbone to feature aggregation, we provide practical and generalizable insights for leveraging MLLMs in NGCG. Our method achieves SOTA on GeoText-1652 with a 12.2% improvement in Text-to-Image Recall@1 and secures top performance in 5 out of 12 subtasks on CVG-Text, all while surpassing baselines with far fewer trainable parameters. These results position MLLMs as a robust foundation for semantic cross-view retrieval and pave the way for MLLM-based NGCG to be adopted as a scalable, powerful alternative to traditional dual-encoder designs. Project page and code are available at https://yuqichen888.github.io/NGCG-MLLMs-web/.
2604.10721.paper_summary_zh: 自然語言引導的跨視角地理定位（NGCG）旨在利用地面場景的文本描述檢索地理標記的衛星影像。雖然最近的 NGCG 方法通常依賴於 CLIP 風格的雙編碼器架構，但它們往往面臨跨模態泛化能力弱的問題，並且需要複雜的架構設計。相比之下，多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）提供強大的語義推理能力，但並未直接針對檢索任務進行優化。在本研究中，我們提出了一個簡單而有效的框架，通過參數高效的微調來適應 MLLMs 用於 NGCG。我們的方法優化了 MLLM 中的潛在表示，同時保留其預訓練的多模態知識，使得在不重新設計模型架構的情況下實現強大的跨模態對齊。通過對從模型主幹到特徵聚合等多種變量的系統分析，我們提供了實用且可泛化的見解，以便在 NGCG 中利用 MLLMs。我們的方法在 GeoText-1652 上達到了 SOTA，Text-to-Image Recall@1 提升了 12.2%，並在 CVG-Text 的 12 個子任務中取得了 5 個的最佳表現，同時超越了基準，且可訓練參數遠少於基準。這些結果使 MLLMs 成為語義跨視角檢索的堅實基礎，並為 MLLM 基於 NGCG 的採用鋪平了道路，成為傳統雙編碼器設計的可擴展且強大的替代方案。項目頁面和代碼可在 https://yuqichen888.github.io/NGCG-MLLMs-web/ 獲得。
2604.10721.author: Yuqi Chen et.al.
2604.10721.authors: Yuqi Chen, Xiaohan Zhang, Ahmad Arrabi, Waqas Sultani, Chen Chen, Safwan Wshah
